name: changes
description: like verbose but report only when a change is made

name: verbose
description: output a diagnostic for every file processed --dereference affect the referent of each symbolic link, rather than the symbolic link itself

name: no-dereference
description: affect each symbolic link, rather than the referent --no-preserve-root do not treat '/' specially (the default) --preserve-root fail to operate recursively on '/' --reference=RFILE use RFILE's mode instead of specifying MODE values. RFILE is always dereferenced if a symbolic link

name: flag-H
description: if a command line argument is a symlink to a directory, traverse it

name: flag-L
description: traverse every symbolic link to a directory encountered

name: flag-P
description: do not traverse any symbolic links

name: help
description: display this help and exit --version output version information and exit
